Batch index=0 size=23

CreateElement key=2 name=html attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=1 child=2
CreateElement key=3 name=head attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=3
CreateElement key=4 name=title attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=3 child=4
CreateText key=5 text="Tom & Jerry <b>"
AppendChild parent=4 child=5
CreateElement key=6 name=body attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=6
CreateElement key=7 name=section attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=6 child=7
CreateElement key=8 name=textarea attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=7 child=8
CreateText key=9 text="A&B<x>"
AppendChild parent=8 child=9
CreateElement key=10 name=p attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=7 child=10
CreateElement key=11 name=em attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=10 child=11
CreateText key=12 text="ok"
AppendChild parent=11 child=12
